frames.name: Tech Enthusiast Hardware Focus
frames.description: Emphasizes technical specifications, performance improvements, and hardware comparisons with detailed spec sheets and benchmark expectations
frames.emphasis: Processor upgrades, camera specifications, display improvements, and year-over-year hardware changes

frames.name: Consumer Shopping Guide
frames.description: Focuses on pricing, preorder deals, availability, and purchasing options across different retailers
frames.emphasis: Where to buy, gift card offers, storage options, and release dates

frames.name: Industry Economics/Supply Chain
frames.description: Frames the story through the lens of memory chip shortages, pricing pressures, and broader industry challenges
frames.emphasis: Memory chip crunch impact, price increases, supply chain constraints, and industry-wide implications

frames.name: AI Innovation Showcase
frames.description: Positions the phones as AI-first devices with emphasis on software features and partnerships
frames.emphasis: Agentic AI capabilities, Gemini integration, privacy features, and AI-powered tools

frames.name: Incremental Update Assessment
frames.description: Critically evaluates the phones as minor upgrades with mixed value propositions
frames.emphasis: Limited hardware changes, price increases without proportional improvements, and evolutionary rather than revolutionary updates

outlierPerspectives: Privacy display as marquee feature - only TechCrunch and briefly mentioned elsewhere treats this as a significant innovation
Material regression analysis - only Ars Technica notes the titanium-to-aluminum downgrade on the Ultra model
Geographic processor variations - only TechCrunch mentions Samsung using Exynos processors in some regions
Memory shortage as strategic AI constraint - CNBC uniquely frames this as impacting AI roadmaps rather than just pricing
missingContext: Competitive landscape analysis - no comparison with iPhone 17 series or other Android flagships
Previous generation sales performance to contextualize pricing strategy
Actual AI feature utility and adoption rates from previous Galaxy AI implementations
Environmental impact of material changes (titanium to aluminum)
Regional availability and pricing variations beyond processor differences
Long-term software support commitments and update timeline
Battery life real-world performance despite capacity increases
Impact on Samsung's market share and competitive positioning
